description: SYNTHETIC — venue newsletter listing multiple shows; no purchase.

email.subject: This month at Marble Bar
email.body:
Hey Detroit!

Coming up this month:

Oct 2 — Rolando (all night)
Oct 9 — Toasted w/ residents
Oct 16 — DJ Minx
Oct 23 — Halloween warehouse special (lineup TBA)

Tickets available at the door and on RA. See you on the floor.
